title: The River
why_this_song: The River by Bruce Springsteen (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And into the river we'd dive
Oh-oh, down to the river we'd ride
And, man, that was all she wrote
And into the river we'd dive
Oh-oh, down to the river we did ride, ay-ay-ay

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "river" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "river" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we'd" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we'd" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I come from down in the valley
And, man, that was all she wrote
Well, mister, they vanished right into the air

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And into the river we'd dive
At night on them banks I'd lie awake

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The River" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The River" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The River", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The River", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The River" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The River" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
